title: Alternative Set-Theoretic IR Models Venn Diagram
description: A Venn diagram showing the relationships and overlaps between the Boolean, Fuzzy Set, and Extended Boolean (p-norm) retrieval models, highlighting their core principles and how they extend from one another.
relationships: The Boolean Model is a subset of the Fuzzy Set Model, which is itself a subset of the Extended Boolean Model, demonstrating a progression from binary to graduated matching.
